behavior_summary: Provides the short, player-visible description when the associated object is examined: it displays the single line "dead man's clothes".
Runs as a U8P_DEADCLOZ::look/examine process (processType 0x0208) and then ends or suspends, so the handler is a one-shot description with no branching or state changes.
No global flags, external calls, menus, or conditionals are involved — the script's effect is purely presentational and likely attached to a clothing/corpse object.
notable_control_flow: Single linear path: entry via the U8P_DEADCLOZ::look process, emit a bark, then suspend/terminate the process.
No conditional branches, loops, or menu-driven branches are present.
No reads or writes of global flags or parameters; behavior is local and idempotent.
open_questions: What exact in-game item or object this script is attached to (inferred to be a corpse/clothing but not explicit).
Whether the trailing suspend token represents an immediate termination or a suspension yielding to other engine tasks (inferred from decompiled token).
Whether an implicit 'this' parameter (the item instance) is available to the process and used elsewhere in the original source (not referenced here).

main_function.name: U8P_DEADCLOZ::look
main_function.purpose: When the player examines the object, present the short descriptive text "dead man's clothes" and then end/suspend the U8P_DEADCLOZ::look process.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the game's 'U8P_DEADCLOZ::look' (examine) action for the object (processType 0x0208).
Effectively triggers when the player inspects or targets the item instance that holds this script.

function_map.name: U8P_DEADCLOZ::look
function_map.role: Look/examine handler that emits a single bark describing the object

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the short, player-visible description when the associated object is examined: it displays the single line "dead man's clothes".
